title: CyberAgent moves faster with ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex
description: CyberAgent uses ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to securely scale AI adoption, improve quality, and accelerate decisions across advertising, media, and gaming.

title: EVGeoQA: Benchmarking LLMs on Dynamic, Multi-Objective Geo-Spatial Exploration
description:

title: Knowledge Graphs Generation from Cultural Heritage Texts: Combining LLMs and Ontological Engineering for Scholarly Debates
description:

title: ChatGPT and Cancer: How a Tech Founder Rewrote His Treatment Plan
description: When GitLab co-founder Sid Sijbrandij was diagnosed with a rare and aggressive cancer, he approached it like an engineering problem.
